description_long: This is a compact, vintage-style sedan with a boxy silhouette and a two-tone paint scheme, primarily light gray with a darker gray front fender. The car features a simple, utilitarian design with flat body panels, minimal ornamentation, and a slightly sloped roofline. The windows are large and rectangular, providing good visibility, and the side mirrors are absent or not visible. The wheels are small, dark, and appear to be made of steel with a basic hubcap or no hubcap at all. The front grille is understated, with round headlights set into the bodywork and a subtle emblem at the center. The overall appearance suggests a mid-20th-century Eastern European or utilitarian sedan, likely constructed from metal with glass windows and rubber tires.
description: A compact, vintage-style sedan with a boxy shape, light gray body, and darker gray front fender, featuring simple round headlights and small steel wheels.
description_view_0: Side view showing the left profile, two doors, and a darker gray front fender.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the flat hood, round headlights, and simple grille.
description_view_2: Side view showing the right profile, matching the left with two doors and a darker gray front fender.
description_view_3: Rear view with minimal visible detail, showing the back window and taillight outlines.
attribute_wheel_design: Small, dark steel wheels with no visible spokes or hubcaps, simple utilitarian appearance.
